_comment_purpose: Phase F / RRG-03 diagnosis fixture — step A. Documents an *intended* mutation that, if applied for real, would remove the C1 baseline match for the follow-up locator 'Validate token', making the fixture genuinely drift-inducing. Not executed by replay_minimal.py; no real file I/O is performed in this PR.
_comment_scope: Diagnosis-only fixture. Proof status: NOT_PROVEN. Patch-Gate: NOT_TRIGGERED.
description: Replace the first 'Validate token' occurrence (under '## Authentication') with a semantically equivalent but lexically different phrase, e.g. 'Check token before session creation.' This removes the C1 baseline match from the match set for the follow-up locator 'Validate token', while the second occurrence ('Validate token after session restoration.' under '## Authentication Notes') remains intact. After real application of this step, Step B's locator 'Validate token' can no longer resolve to the same match as the C1 baseline resolution — it must either drift to the remaining second occurrence ('drifted') or fail to find the expected match ('not_found'/'ambiguous'). This is the intended drift-inducing condition for RRG-03.
execution_note: No real apply was performed. This step exists only to document the *kind* of mutation that would create the conditions Phase F / RRG-03 wants to study.
